title: Pathfinder Coordinator Result v1
description: Output envelope produced by the Pathfinder coordinator after all Division invocations complete. Contains per-Division results, synthesis, and audit receipt reference. No PII.

coordinator_status.description: WITHIN_TOLERANCE = all Divisions responded. CONTROLLED = some Divisions skipped or degraded. FAILED_CLOSED = founding law mismatch or crisis gate unresolved.

division_results.description: One entry per Division invoked. Ordered: crisis Division first if flagged, then remaining Divisions.

gaps.description: Domains requested but no active Division found in registry. Surfaces missing coverage rather than silently ignoring it.

receipt_ref.description: Path to the coordinator audit receipt. Contains full Division sub-receipts. Written before result is returned.

resolved.description: false = crisis Division did not return a resolved status. coordinator_status will be FAILED_CLOSED.

status.description: COMPLETED = result received. SKIPPED = Division not applicable to this case. DEGRADED = Division ran but returned low-confidence output. FAILED = Division did not complete.

result_summary.description: Anonymized plain-language summary of what this Division found or recommended.

receipt_ref.description: Path to this Division's individual DivisionInvoke receipt.

Synthesis.description: Flame's Witness layer — neutral synthesis of all Division results. Does not favor any single Division.

primary_path.description: The single most important next step for this veteran based on all Division results.

next_actions.description: Ordered list of actions across all Divisions. Crisis actions appear first.

domain_summaries.description: Per-domain plain-language summary for the veteran. Keys are domain names.

if_blocked.description: What to do if primary_path is not available or fails.

quorum_met.description: true = at least one Division returned COMPLETED status. Synthesis is actionable. false = all Divisions failed or were skipped — synthesis is advisory only.
